seo.title: AI Agent Error Handling Patterns in Flowise Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix ai agent error handling patterns in Flowise agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Flowise, AI Agent Error Handling Patterns manifest as silent failures in drag-and-drop chatflows where nodes like LLM chains, vector stores, and custom tools fail without propagating errors upstream. Unvalidated intermediate outputs from sequential agent nodes create cascading inaccuracies, while multi-agent handoffs lose critical context between Flowise's node-based execution. Custom tool nodes often fail silently due to Flowise's default error suppression, making debugging complex RAG pipelines nearly impossible without specialized monitoring.

howItManifests.scenario: Chatflow chains producing unvalidated intermediate outputs
howItManifests.symptom: LLM Chain nodes output malformed JSON or hallucinated data passed to downstream Document Loader nodes
howItManifests.impact: RAG pipelines return irrelevant answers; agent responses contain fabricated citations

howItManifests.scenario: Vector store retrieval returning low-relevance documents
howItManifests.symptom: Retriever nodes return documents with similarity scores < 0.7 without filtering
howItManifests.impact: Agents hallucinate confidently using irrelevant context; answer quality drops 40-60%

howItManifests.scenario: Custom tool nodes failing silently without error propagation
howItManifests.symptom: Custom Function nodes throw exceptions but Flowise continues with null outputs
howItManifests.impact: Agents return 'tool failed' responses without actionable error details or retries

howItManifests.scenario: Multi-agent sequential flow losing context between agent handoffs
howItManifests.symptom: Memory nodes fail to persist conversation state between Agent Executor nodes
howItManifests.impact: Agents lose user context mid-conversation; require full context re-explanation

detection.name: Monitor LLM Chain Output Validation
detection.description: Detect unvalidated JSON outputs from Flowise LLM Chain nodes by parsing chatflow traversal data

detection.name: Vector Store Relevance Score Check
detection.description: Scan Retriever node outputs for documents below relevance threshold in Flowise vector stores

detection.name: Custom Tool Silent Failure Detection
detection.description: Identify Custom Function nodes returning null/undefined without error logs in Flowise

fixes.name: Add Output Validation Wrapper Node
fixes.description: Insert JavaScript Function node before LLM Chain outputs to validate JSON schema

fixes.name: Retriever Score Filter Implementation
fixes.description: Add Document Filter node after Vector Store Retriever with minimum similarity threshold

fixes.name: Error Boundary for Custom Tools
fixes.description: Wrap custom tool functions with try-catch and structured error propagation

vexAutomation.heading: Automating AI Agent Error Handling Patterns Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates directly into Flowise chatflows as a callback handler, automatically detecting all four error patterns across your drag-and-drop pipelines. During chatflow execution, Vex intercepts node outputs, validates LLM chain responses against JSON schemas, monitors vector store relevance scores, captures silent custom tool failures, and tracks context loss between multi-agent handoffs. 

Vex provides real-time alerting with structured error payloads and automated remediation workflows. For unvalidated outputs, Vex can trigger fallback prompts or retry logic. Low-relevance documents trigger relevance-boosting re-queries. Silent tool failures activate backup tools or human-in-the-loop escalation. Context loss triggers memory reconstruction from conversation history. 

The Vex dashboard shows error patterns across all Flowise deployments with one-click fixes that update your chatflow configurations automatically, reducing agent downtime by 85% and improving answer accuracy by 40%.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex in 2 minutes to automatically detect and fix Flowise agent error patterns across all your chatflows.
